privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official USACE Muncie, Indiana flood model dataset (White River) provided as a standard example with HEC-RAS 6.6. The target output paths, HDF5 output file name ('Muncie.p04.hdf'), and constants (C=1.2, g=32.174, Sg=2.65) for the Isbash equation match the task instructions exactly and are properly checked in the verification logic.
